product: Slack Access and Integration Logs managed ingestion connector (Beta)
tagline: The Slack Access and Integration Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Slack Access and Integration Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest workspace access logs and app integration change logs from Slack into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Slack Access and Integration Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest workspace access logs and app integration change logs from Slack into Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Slack Access and Integration Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
